name: Isisombululo seRinger encancisiweyo (LR)
description: Ulwelo lwe-isotonic crystalloid olulungelelanisiweyo. Ikhethwa ngaphezu kwe-saline eqhelekileyo yokuvuselela i-volume-volume enkulu-i-physiologically balanced, ingozi encinci ye-hyperchloremic acidosis. Iqulethe i-sodium, i-potassium, i-calcium, i-lactate.
dose: Umothuko we-Hemorrhagic: Mda ukuya kwi-1L max phambi kokuba utshintshele kwiimveliso zegazi. Ithagethi ye-SBP 80-90 mmHg i-trauma yokungena, i-90 mmHg TBI. Ukutshisa (i-Parkland): 4 mL x kg x %TBSA itshise ngaphezu kwe-24h (isiqingatha kwi-8h yokuqala).
warnings: Sekunjalo icrystalloid--ayikwazi ukuthwala ioksijini. Iimveliso zegazi ziphezulu kwi-hemorrhagic shock. I-LR yibhulorho kuphela.
Musa ukudibanisa kunye neemveliso zegazi kumgca ofanayo (i-calcium ibangela i-clotting).
UNGAVUMI ngokugqithiselayo kumonzakalo ongeneyo ngaphambi kokulawula ukopha.

pediatric.dose: I-20 mL / kg bolus, phinda uhlolisise. Ikhethwa ngaphezu kwe-NS kumonzakalo wabantwana.

obstetric.note: Ulwelo olukhethwayo lwe-IV ekuzalweni nasekubelekeni. Kufanelekile ukuvuswa kwe-obstetric hemorrhage.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS / ABA Burn Guidelines
